name: Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash
notes: This rule triggers when a cryptocurrency mining file hash is detected. This could indicate a machine infected by a malware or a misuse of a corporate asset.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Events
BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Flows
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Events, BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Flows
TD_list: APPLY Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Events, BB:Threats: Cryptocurrency Mining Threat Hashes for Flows
RED_list: Event name: Cryptocurrency Mining File Hash
Event description: A cryptocurrency mining file hash has been detected.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
